nextAction: For public-safe activation: (a) SCHOOL_LEVEL_SOURCE — HMS Visiting Students Program covers BWH + MGH placement; (b) final-year MS only; (c) international students eligible via VSLO with Oct-Mar window restriction; (d) $115 application fee per experience; (e) 1-3 months duration; (f) tuition amount queued for retry from Scheduling & Tuition sub-page; (g) visa policy not stated on hub.
plainEnglishSummary: Brigham and Women's Hospital accepts visiting medical students through Harvard Medical School's Visiting Students Program. Final-year medical students apply via VSLO. International students CAN apply but are restricted to a October-March rotation window. The application fee is $115 per experience selected. Rotations run 1-3 months. BWH and MGH are both explicitly named placement sites in the program. Actual tuition amount lives on a separate Scheduling & Tuition sub-page and was not captured this turn — queued for retry.
driftCheck: This advanced national USCE discovery because BWH (HMS-affiliated) was confirmed with an international-eligible USCE lane and Oct-Mar window restriction captured verbatim; MA gained a second P101 packet.
